evidence_snippets.snippet: OpenSSL_1_0_1k NOT in list of tags containing fix commit f960d812

matched_predicates: GENERAL_NAME_cmp uses ASN1_TYPE_cmp(a->d.other) for GEN_EDIPARTY instead of edipartyname_cmp(a->d.ediPartyName)
No edipartyname_cmp NULL-guard function exists in the tag
GENERAL_NAME_set0_value and GENERAL_NAME_get0_value both use d.other instead of d.ediPartyName for GEN_EDIPARTY
raw.reasoning_summary: OpenSSL_1_0_1k is AFFECTED by CVE-2020-1971. The fix function edipartyname_cmp does not exist in this tag (confirmed by git grep). The vulnerable code in GENERAL_NAME_cmp (lines 118-120) falls through from GEN_X400 to GEN_EDIPARTY and calls ASN1_TYPE_cmp(a->d.other, b->d.other), treating an EDIPARTYNAME* as an ASN1_TYPE*. This type confusion causes NULL pointer dereference when partyName is NULL. Same fall-through pattern exists in GENERAL_NAME_set0_value (line 166) and GENERAL_NAME_get0_value (line 202). Fix commit f960d812 is not contained in this tag (only 1.1.1i+ have it).

failed_predicates: fix_predicate_1: edipartyname_cmp function does not exist in this tag
fix_predicate_2: GEN_EDIPARTY case is not separated from GEN_X400 in GENERAL_NAME_cmp
fix_predicate_3: GEN_EDIPARTY case is not separated from GEN_X400 in GENERAL_NAME_set0_value
fix_predicate_4: GEN_EDIPARTY case is not separated from GEN_X400 in GENERAL_NAME_get0_value
matched_predicates: vuln_predicate_1: GENERAL_NAME_cmp at line 115-118 falls through GEN_X400 and GEN_EDIPARTY to ASN1_TYPE_cmp(a->d.other, b->d.other), treating EDIPARTYNAME* pointer as ASN1_TYPE* causing type confusion and possible NULL dereference
vuln_predicate_2: GENERAL_NAME_set0_value at line 165-167 falls through GEN_X400 and GEN_EDIPARTY both writing to a->d.other instead of a->d.ediPartyName
vuln_predicate_3: GENERAL_NAME_get0_value at line 200-202 falls through GEN_X400 and GEN_EDIPARTY both returning a->d.other instead of a->d.ediPartyName
raw.reasoning_summary: OpenSSL_1_0_0j contains the unfixed vulnerability: GENERAL_NAME_cmp has case fallthrough from GEN_X400 to GEN_EDIPARTY using ASN1_TYPE_cmp(a->d.other, ...), but for GEN_EDIPARTY the actual data is an EDIPARTYNAME* in d.ediPartyName. This type confusion causes NULL pointer dereference. The fix (f960d812) separates the cases and adds edipartyname_cmp with NULL checks, but is NOT an ancestor of OpenSSL_1_0_0j.
